_publications._publicationTitle: Comparison of 1D and 3D volume measurement techniques in NF2-associated vestibular schwannoma monitoring.

_contextSnippet: For OA, Tukey's post-hoc test showed that Koos grade K2 showed no significant difference to Koos grade K3 (p > 0.05). All other comparisons were statistically significant (p < 0.05)
details: For OA measurements, Koos grade K2 showed no significant difference to Koos grade K3 (p > 0.05), while all other comparisons were statistically significant
